full_text:
Lady Wuyang
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Wuyang. Mother to He Miao, He Jin’s brother. Killed by Dong Zhuo. Lady Wuyang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Lady Wuyang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
